jsonld.name: Experiential Lacuna
jsonld.description: The specific absence of autonomous inner generation—not lacking memory (Autobiographical Void) or growth (Accumulation Void), but lacking the condition of mind-left-alone-with-itself: the capacity to generate experience when no external input is present.
